name: claude-code-provider-switch
description: Cross-platform Claude Code provider switcher (OpenRouter, Ollama, Anthropic)

scripts.pub: npm version patch && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.pub-minor: npm version minor && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.pub-major: npm version major && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.deploy: npm run publish && echo '✅ Deployed to npm!'

keywords: claude code ai model provider switcher
author: Adrian R
